nodes.name: Ptilorrhoa
nodes.summary: Ptilorrhoa（Ptilorrhoa）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联4种鸟类，如Spotted jewel-babbler、Blue jewel-babbler、Brown-headed jewel-babbler等4种鸟类。

nodes.name: Chestnut-backed jewel-babbler
nodes.summary: Chestnut-backed jewel-babbler（Ptilorrhoa castanonota）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Chestnut-backed jewel-babbler。

nodes.name: Chestnut-backed jewel-babbler
nodes.summary: The chestnut-backed jewel-babbler (Ptilorrhoa castanonota) is a species of bird in the family Cinclosomatidae. It is endemic to New Guinea. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests and subtropical or tropical moist montane forests. References
nodes.shortSummary: The chestnut-backed jewel-babbler (Ptilorrhoa castanonota) is a species of bird in the family Cinclosomatidae. It is endemic to New Guinea.
